name: soc2_asset_controls_base_features_v1
description: SOC 2 decision-grade asset control features derived from dev_assets for continuous monitoring and evidence readiness (silver layer).

properties.notes: Non-aggregate features only. Aggregations belong in gold cubes.

soc2_access_and_hardening.name: soc2_access_and_hardening
soc2_access_and_hardening.description: Asset configuration signals that map to secure configuration and access-related control expectations.

features.name: soc2_secure_boot_enabled
features.description: Boolean interpretation of secure_boot_status to indicate if secure boot is enabled.
features.purpose: Evidence-friendly hardening flag used for SOC2 control posture scoring.

features.name: soc2_domain_joined_flag
features.description: True if the asset is domain joined (normalized from domain_joined).
features.purpose: Segments managed vs unmanaged assets for access governance expectations.

features.name: soc2_powershell_exec_policy_risk
features.purpose: Row-level signal for risky execution policy configurations increasing attack likelihood.

features.name: soc2_smb_legacy_protocol_enabled
features.description: True when smb1 is enabled, indicating legacy protocol exposure.
features.purpose: Strong misconfiguration signal that indicates higher attack surface and audit finding risk.

features.name: soc2_is_bastion_device
features.purpose: Bastion hosts are crown-jewel access points that require stricter SOC2 control posture validation.

soc2_asset_inventory_and_classification.name: soc2_asset_inventory_and_classification
soc2_asset_inventory_and_classification.description: Canonical identity and classification features supporting evidence for maintained asset inventory and scoping.

features.name: soc2_asset_is_cloud
features.purpose: Separates cloud assets from on-prem for control scoping and evidence packaging.

features.name: soc2_device_type_normalized
features.description: Normalized device type derived from device_type/device_subtype (server/workstation/laptop/unknown).
features.purpose: Supports evidence-driven segmentation and control baselines by device class.

features.name: soc2_asset_environment
features.description: Derived environment label (prod/stage/dev/corp/unknown) from zone and tags.
features.purpose: Production assets require stricter SOC2 posture requirements and higher monitoring expectations.

features.name: soc2_location_fingerprint
features.purpose: Supports location-based scoping and evidence reporting (especially for physical safeguards).

soc2_monitoring_coverage_and_freshness.name: soc2_monitoring_coverage_and_freshness
soc2_monitoring_coverage_and_freshness.description: Non-aggregate monitoring freshness features used to prove ongoing observation and evidence recency.

features.name: soc2_asset_last_seen_ts
features.description: Most recent observation timestamp derived from events_timestamp/last_processed/store_updated_at.
features.purpose: Primary anchor for evidence freshness and continuous monitoring checks.

features.name: soc2_minutes_since_last_seen
features.purpose: Row-level freshness used to detect telemetry gaps and monitoring failures.

features.name: soc2_is_active_asset
features.description: True when asset was seen recently AND not retired (policy threshold-driven).
features.purpose: Ensures control checks apply only to in-scope active assets.

features.name: soc2_is_stale_by_policy
features.description: Derived stale flag using deterministic policy thresholds regardless of upstream is_stale field.
features.purpose: Consistent audit-evidence signal that the asset is out of monitoring freshness bounds.

soc2_patch_and_change_hygiene_proxies.name: soc2_patch_and_change_hygiene_proxies
soc2_patch_and_change_hygiene_proxies.description: Row-level maintenance readiness signals derived from uptime, reboot pending, OS/BIOS age.

features.name: soc2_reboot_pending_flag
features.description: True when is_reboot_pending indicates pending reboot to complete changes or patches.
features.purpose: Signals incomplete patch application and operational drift risk.

features.name: soc2_uptime_days
features.description: Uptime in days derived from uptime_mins / 1440.
features.purpose: Proxy for patch cadence and operational hygiene (very long uptime may imply deferred maintenance).

features.name: soc2_bios_age_days
features.purpose: Maintenance posture signal; unusually old BIOS can indicate patch backlog and security debt.

features.name: soc2_os_install_age_days
features.purpose: Proxy for lifecycle maturity; very old OS installs correlate with drift and hardening gaps.
